data.label: Style
data.name: w33s3 Dark
data.description: Dark, moody atmosphere with high contrast lighting. Cinematic composition with neon accent colors against deep blacks. Professional photography feel, dramatic shadows, rich color depth. Modern minimalist aesthetic, no text or watermarks.

data.label: Action
data.content: Noir comic book style, muted blacks and grays with selective color pops of amber and teal. A visual node graph diagram floats in the center, its connections glowing with energy. Around it, illustrated storyboard panels emerge - a man with wild eyes holding a shotgun, a teenager on stage with a guitar, a courtroom scene. The nodes connect to the images like a creative assembly line. Dark industrial workshop atmosphere, dramatic lighting from the node connections. Technical diagram meets film noir aesthetic.
